analysis.reasoning: Core message: Lavrov quips that the US cannot have a color revolution because it lacks an American embassy—implying the US engineers such revolutions abroad—then adds a seemingly conciliatory note about not wanting the US to fall into crisis. Evaluation per narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile/decadent): Yes. The joke insinuates US interference in other countries’ internal affairs (engineering color revolutions), depicting the US/West as hostile and immoral actors. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system): Not present; no mention of multipolarity, BRICS, or alternative order. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner): Partially implied by the closing sentence wishing the US avoids crisis, but it does not clearly present Russia’s role as a partner promoting peace or development; insufficient to qualify. RU4 (Russian history admirable): Not referenced. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront): Not referenced. RU6 (Russia’s culture/nature): Not referenced. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU1.
